isolation.boundary: Local app routes only; assigned assertions only; no code changes

assertions.title: DateNavigation with picker, arrows, presets, and view toggle

steps.action: Verify today boundary in Night view
steps.observed: At /dashboard?view=night (today), Next day button was disabled.

steps.action: Use date picker and view toggles
steps.expected: Date picker selects date and view switches preserve date context
steps.observed: Date picker opened from date button and selecting Apr 3 updated URL; switching Night/Recovery/Trend preserved date=2026-04-04 context.
7D and 1Y tabs switched selected range state while keeping trend date context.

steps.expected: Previous-day button disables at earliest data date
steps.observed: At old date 2023-08-01, Previous day remained enabled (not clamped/disabled).

assertions.issues: Earliest-date boundary is not enforced: Previous-day button stayed enabled on old historical dates.

assertions.title: Loading, empty, and error states handled gracefully

steps.observed: Displayed 'No data available for this night'.
Rendered Night content and showed 'No sleep stage data available'.
Aborted /api/views/night requests produced 'Failed to load night data' with visible Retry button.
With delayed fetch patch, loading-state check found skeleton placeholders (skeleton count: 5) before response completion.

evidence.network: Normal night fetch returned 200; temporary in-session route abort reproduced failure state with retry UI.

assertions.title: Responsive layout at desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports

steps.expected: Desktop view renders correctly with no horizontal overflow
steps.observed: Desktop rendered without horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=1440, clientWidth=1440).

steps.expected: Tablet remains fully usable without horizontal cutoff
steps.observed: Tablet rendered without horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=768, clientWidth=768).
Mobile showed horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=478, clientWidth=375) and horizontal scroll.

assertions.issues: Mobile viewport still overflows horizontally (375px viewport rendered 478px document width).

assertions.title: Fresh baselines render as normal range bands on frontend

steps.action: Open Night view (2026-04-04) and expand Heart Rate strip
steps.expected: Heart Rate baseline band rendered across chart at low opacity
steps.observed: Chart rendered area with fill-opacity 0.6; no <=0.15 baseline-band styling found.

steps.expected: heart_rate baseline present (avg/stddev/upper/lower) for band rendering
steps.observed: Night API baselines included deep_sleep/hrv/rhr/sleep_score only; heart_rate baseline was null/absent.

evidence.network: GET /api/views/night?date=2026-04-04 -> 200; baselines keys: deep_sleep, hrv, rhr, sleep_score (heart_rate missing).

assertions.issues: Required Heart Rate baseline band contract is unmet: missing heart_rate baseline data and observed chart fill opacity is 0.6 (not <=0.15).

assertions.title: Trend view date click navigates to Night Detail view

steps.action: Open Trend view (date=2026-04-04) with 7D + Daily state
steps.expected: Trend chart displays clickable date points
steps.observed: Trend chart rendered interactive point region and active point state after point focus.

steps.action: Click a specific trend date point
steps.expected: Navigate to Night detail for selected date
steps.observed: After activating and clicking the focused point, navigation occurred to /dashboard?view=night&date=2026-04-04.

evidence.network: GET /api/views/night?date=2026-04-04 (fetch) observed immediately after point click flow.

assertions.title: View navigation preserves context on browser back

steps.action: Start from Trend with custom context (7D + Daily), then navigate to Night via date-point click

steps.expected: Return to Trend with prior range/metric context preserved
steps.observed: Returned to /dashboard?view=trend&date=2026-04-04 but selected tabs reset to Trend + 30D + Weekly (not prior 7D + Daily).
In-page probe value persisted and no new requests were captured after Back.

evidence.network: No requests captured on browser Back in this run; state reset still occurred.

assertions.issues: Back navigation returned to Trend URL/date but did not preserve prior range/metric context (reset to 30D/Weekly).

frictions.description: Heart Rate strip header click was intermittently blocked by annotation marker overlay intercepting pointer events.
frictions.resolution: Used scripted header click to expand the strip for evidence capture.

frictions.description: Trend point navigation required focusing a chart point first; direct chart-region click did not immediately navigate.
frictions.resolution: Activated a specific point and then clicked the focused point to trigger Trend -> Night navigation.

summary: Tested 6 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-UICMP-004, VAL-CROSS-008) and 4 failed (VAL-UICMP-003, VAL-UICMP-006, VAL-CROSS-007, VAL-CROSS-009).
